name: polyglot-lang
description: Language support for Polyglot (.pg): syntax highlighting, formatting, and diagnostics.

polyglot.cliPath.description: Path to the polyglot CLI executable. Defaults to 'polyglot' on PATH; set to e.g. the built x64/Debug/MintPlayer.Polyglot.Cli.exe for a source checkout.

polyglot.diagnostics.enabled.description: Report parse/type errors from `polyglot check` on open and save.

polyglot.lib.description: Comma-separated `lib` prelude passed to `polyglot check` (so ambient names like `print`/`Math` resolve). Mirrors the CLI's --lib. Until per-project config lands (P10/P11), this is the assumed prelude.
